description: Primary Phase 3 Real Property Permit source configuration for Cabarrus FutureScape.

sources.name: Cabarrus County Real Property Permit CSV
notes: This source supersedes the public 2015 OpenData permit layer for current Phase 3 permit intelligence planning.
The source has no geometry; future spatial context should be derived by joining ParcelNumber to the trusted parcel layer.
Do not overwrite public.permit_activity or public.permit_activity_clean when ingesting this source.
